title: The Tank
tagline: Design one fish and let it swim forever with everyone else's.
holy_shit: Your tiny fish keeps swimming in a crowd of strangers' fish for weeks, with no server and no owner.
powered_by: Browser canvas animation + GitHub Issues as a shared, token-free fish list
agent_scenario: When you need: a no-backend shared toy where everyone contributes persistent objects through issue-backed state.
author: kody-w + Copilot
